MINI MINUTES: Judge Ellen Chaitin; Clerk: SRavinantapricha/D. Hakewill; Not Reported. (D514)
Appearances:
Plaintiff Song Lee is present.
Attorney Milton Katz appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Philip Hammond is present.
Attorney Aaron Palley representing the defendant through limited scope.
The Judge Pro Tem Amanda Fischer, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 501A, for settlement discussions.

The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed.

This case settled, the trial date of OCT-11-2011 is vacated.
